message:
feat(ffs-core): add RepairPolicy + comprehensive DurabilityAutopilot tests (bd-98b)

Add RepairPolicy struct connecting autopilot to repair overhead selection,
with effective_overhead() delegating to autopilot when engaged.

Add 16 tests for the Bayesian expected-loss policy:
- Posterior: uniform prior, conjugate update, convergence, variance decrease
- Autopilot: fresh behavior, low/high corruption response, corruption increase
  reaction, group size effects, custom loss costs, edge cases (empty/invalid
  candidates), risk monotonicity, explainability fields, JSON serialization
- RepairPolicy: static vs autopilot delegation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
